message:
feat(drasi): selected query with results spans full width (#7880)

* feat(drasi): selected query with results spans full width

Match the Drasi reference UI: the query currently showing its results
table (top-losers-query by default) now spans columns 3 → 5 (queries +
right-trunk + reactions' column space), giving the nested results table
room to stretch horizontally instead of being cramped in the narrow
queries column.

Changes:
- Restructure the grid from flex-column sub-containers to explicit
  grid-row/grid-column placement, so individual cells can span multiple
  columns independently.
- For the spanning query, skip the q-out → trunk2 branch (trunk2 passes
  vertically through the wide card naturally).
- Compute trunk2X using only non-spanning queries so the spanning card's
  far-right edge doesn't pull trunk2 into the reactions column.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(drasi): slow flow dots + narrow spanning-query reach

Addresses live feedback:

1. Slow the flow-dot animation: 2s → 5s cycle. At 2s the dots looked
   hectic and cluttered; 5s reads as steady continuous-query flow.

2. Spanning query no longer pushes into the reactions column.
   gridColumn changed from '3 / 6' (spans col 3+4+5, overlapping the
   reactions column) to '3 / 5' (col 3+4 only — queries + right trunk,
   stopping before reactions). Matches the Drasi reference where
   top-losers extends past the other queries but not all the way across.

3. trunk2 bottom now anchors to the last non-spanning query's row
   instead of diving into the spanning card's interior.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
